title: cucubalus noctiflorus
intro: Cucubalus noctiflorus, also known as Night-flowering Cushion Spurge, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Cucubalus noctiflorus has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and topical creams, with the roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts.
